mncDimJustif.Description: Aligning the extension or dimension lines along the specified straight line
mncDimJustif.msg1: Select dimensions for alignment of extension lines
mncDimJustif.msg2: First point of the alignment line:
mncDimJustif.msg3: Select dimensions for alignment of dimension lines
mncDimJustif.msg4: Second point of the alignment line:
